overall.description: A samurai character in a straw hat walks through a vibrant spring meadow filled with white flowers and cherry blossom trees, approaching a waterfall with a snow-capped mountain in the distance. The footage is from a video game (Ghost of Tsushima), featuring cinematic third-person camera following the character through the idyllic natural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: spring meadow with white wildflowers and scattered cherry trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the flower field toward the distant waterfall

entered.detail: field covered in dense white wildflowers
tree with white blossoms scattered throughout the meadow
waterfall cascading down dark stone cliffs
large mountain with snow-covered peak visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open meadow blanketed with white wildflowers under a clear blue sky. Cherry blossom trees dot the landscape while a rocky waterfall and snow-capped mountain become visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky waterfall basin with stone cliffs

events.description: character passes alongside the waterfall, which moves from right to left in the frame

agents.ego_description: walking past the waterfall along the grassy edge of the stone basin

entered.detail: dark rocky cliff formation beside the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the rocky waterfall, moving along the stone cliff face. The waterfall transitions from the right side of the frame to the left and eventually falls behind as the snow-capped mountain becomes more prominent directly ahead.

events.description: sun becomes visible in the upper sky creating a bright lens flare effect

agents.ego_description: ascending the gentle grassy slope toward the snow-capped mountain

entered.detail: bright sun visible in the clear blue sky

segments.scene_description: Moving past the waterfall basin, the character ascends a grassy hillside with the snow-capped mountain dominating the view ahead. The sun becomes directly visible in the sky, creating a bright glare as the character continues through the cherry blossom trees toward the mountain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant spring meadow that gradually ascends toward a towering snow-capped mountain. It begins with the character walking through a wide-open expanse of white wildflowers and cherry blossom trees under a clear blue sky. As the character advances, the camera tracks alongside a rocky waterfall that shifts from the right to the left of the frame before falling behind as the mountain becomes more prominent. The scene then opens up as the character moves past the waterfall basin and climbs a grassy hillside, with the distant peak dominating the horizon. Finally, the camera pushes forward through more cherry blossom trees as the sun emerges directly in the sky, casting a bright glare over the landscape.
